OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: JPT Will Chen, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Sister Lorna Green appearing as a representative for plaintiff Mercy Services Corporation.
Attorney Carole S. Cullum appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Kenneth B. Steadman is present.
Limited Scope Attorney John Weinstein appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. All parties and counsel are present and confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Settlement reached, written stipulation filed by the clerk, trial date is vacated.
